title: 2000 Dodge Neon Covered in Toys Delights Town
transcript:
Who says childhood has to end?
Juan Carlos Flores drives around his town in a 2000 Dodge Neon.
Forget a fancy paint job or a flashy set of rims!
Flores's vehicle is a kid's dream. It's covered in toys.
Flores says he has a lot of toys now...
because his mother wasn't able to purchase toys for him when he was young.
This driving piece of art is a labor of love.
He carefully places each toy, covering the surface of the car.
There's room to see out of the windshield and the windows, of course,
but every other spot is fair game.
Residents of all ages in Ciudad Juarez, Mexico, find delight in this whimsical form of transportation.
As for Flores, it's soothing a part of his inner child.
Someday, he'd like to fill the entire vehicle with toys.
In the meantime, he gets all the enjoyment of being a kid
while driving around to his very adult responsibilities.
